---

## 1 Project Overview

Static product landing pages for **Global Intelligence Laboratory LLC** (GIL).
Each product has its own hand-written, single-file HTML landing page deployed on
**Cloudflare Pages** with **subdomain-per-product** routing. There is no build
step, no framework, no package manager — the repo root is the deploy output
directory (`/`).

- **Stack:** Plain static HTML5 + inline `<style>` + minimal inline JS. One
  Cloudflare Pages Function (`functions/_middleware.js`) for subdomain routing.
- **Hosting:** Cloudflare Pages, single project, ~25 custom subdomains under
  `gil.consulting`. SSL + CNAME auto-provisioned per custom domain.
- **Forms:** Beta-signup forms POST to FormSubmit (most pages) or Formspree (two
  pages), all targeting `beta@gil.consulting`.
- **Self-contained pages:** Each `*.html` ships its own CSS variables, fonts
  (Google Fonts), and inline scripts. No shared CSS/JS asset bundle.

Authoritative human doc: `README.md` (live URL table + Cloudflare setup steps).

---

## 2 Directory Structure (3 levels)

```
landingpages/
├── README.md                  # Live URL table, Cloudflare + FormSubmit setup
├── .gitignore                 # ignores .DS_Store, *.zip, files/
├── index.html                 # GIL main site / product portfolio (links to 25 pages)
│
├── <product>.html             # one self-contained landing page per product (root)
│   ├── beacon.html        bifrost.html      calldesk.html    carbon.html
│   ├── charter.html       chronicle.html    civibridge.html  council.html
│   ├── familycare.html    galley.html       ghost.html       hephaestus.html
│   ├── maker.html         meridian.html     preflight.html   pulse.html
│   ├── sentri.html        shipdeck.html     teachingcraft.html
│   ├── umbra.html         veritas.html      veritas-platform.html
│   ├── vouch.html         zanshin.html
│   │
│   └── ── NOT in subdomain map (orphan / draft / alt pages) ──
│       afterlight-landing.html   clearance-landing.html
│       foundrybase.html          foundrybase-landing.html
│       fracture-landing.html     veritas-landing.html
│       pentest.html              afterlight-landing.html
│
├── functions/
│   └── _middleware.js         # Cloudflare Pages Function: host→file subdomain router
│
├── og/                        # Open Graph share images (PNG) + preview.html
│   ├── <product>.png × 24     # beacon.png, council.png, veritas-platform.png, …
│   └── preview.html           # local OG-image preview harness
│
└── files/                     # GIT-IGNORED, untracked (10 extra draft .html pages:
                               #   afterlight, canopy, familycareos, griefos, hekate,
                               #   localbizai, machine, ration, solostack, teachcraft)
```

**Distinct sites/pages:** ~32 root HTML pages (25 wired into the subdomain map +
portfolio `index.html`; ~7 orphan/draft pages not routed), plus 10 git-ignored
drafts under `files/`.

---

## 3 Database Schema

N/A — static site, no database.

---

## 4 API Endpoints

N/A — no backend API. The only server-side code is a Cloudflare Pages
**middleware** (`functions/_middleware.js`), not an HTTP API. It intercepts only
root-path (`/`) requests and rewrites them to a static asset; all other paths
(`/og/…`, `/static/…`) pass through untouched. See §8 Routing.

---

## 5 Data Models / Schemas

N/A — no data models. The only structured data is the form payload posted to
FormSubmit/Formspree: `email` (required), plus FormSubmit control fields
`_subject`, `_captcha=false`, `_next`. See §11.

---

## 6 Frontend Component Map

No componentization — each page is a single self-contained HTML file with inline
CSS and (where present) inline JS. There is no shared component library, no JS
framework, no partials/includes.

Recurring per-page section pattern (hand-authored, copy-pasted-then-edited):
- `<head>` meta block: `description`, OpenGraph (`og:*`), Twitter card
  (`twitter:*`), inline SVG favicon (hexagon `⬡` glyph), Google Fonts `<link>`.
- `:root` CSS-variable theme block (per-product palette, e.g. Council uses
  `--gold #c9a227` / `--violet #7c3aed` on near-black `--bg #0a0008`).
- Hero → feature sections → beta-signup `<form>` → footer.

---

## 7 State Management

N/A — no client-side application state. Inline JS (where present) is limited to
small UI behaviors; no global store, no framework state.

---

## 8 Routing

Two layers:

1. **Edge routing — `functions/_middleware.js`** (Cloudflare Pages Function):
   - Runs on every request; acts only on root path (`url.pathname === '/'`).
   - Extracts subdomain from `Host` (parts ≥ 3 and `parts[0] !== 'www'`).
   - Resolves file via explicit `SUBDOMAIN_MAP` (24 entries) else
     `${sub}.html`.
   - Serves via `env.ASSETS.fetch(...)`; on 404 falls back to `/index.html`.
   - Root domain / `www` → `/index.html`.
   - Example: `council.gil.consulting/` → `/council.html`.

2. **In-page links:** `index.html` is the portfolio and links to each product's
   `*.html` directly (relative `href="council.html"` etc.).

NOTE: `SUBDOMAIN_MAP` has 24 entries; the orphan pages (`foundrybase.html`,
`pentest.html`, `*-landing.html`) are **not** mapped and have no subdomain.

---

## 9 Auth & Authorization

N/A — public marketing pages, no authentication or authorization.

---

## 10 Background Jobs

N/A — no scheduled tasks, queues, or cron.

---

## 11 External Integrations

| Integration | Where | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| **Cloudflare Pages** | hosting + `functions/_middleware.js` | static hosting, edge subdomain routing, SSL/CNAME per custom domain |
| **FormSubmit** (`formsubmit.co/beta@gil.consulting`) | most product pages | beta-signup form delivery to `beta@gil.consulting`; requires one-time email confirmation to activate all forms; `_subject` prefixed per product (e.g. "Beta Request — Council") |
| **Formspree** (`formspree.io/f/...`) | `foundrybase.html`, `pentest.html` | alternate form backend — `foundrybase` uses `/f/foundrybase-beta`, `pentest` still has placeholder `/f/YOUR_FORM_ID` |
| **Google Fonts** | every page `<head>` | webfonts (Syne, Space Mono, Inter, DM Sans/Serif, IBM Plex, JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Cormorant Garamond, Figtree, Instrument Serif, etc. — varies per page) |
| **OG image assets** | `og/*.png` referenced as `https://gil.consulting/og/<product>.png` | social share previews |

**Analytics:** NONE detected. No GA4/gtag, GTM, Plausible, Fathom, PostHog,
Umami, or Cloudflare Web Analytics tags found in any page.

Other external host references found in pages (demo/CTA links, not integrations):
`gil.report`, `my-vibe-app.vercel.app`, `localhost` (in `fracture-landing.html`,
`pulse.html`, `zanshin.html`).

---

## 12 Config & Environment

- **No `.env`, no config files, no secrets.** No `package.json`, no bundler/lint
  config.
- **Cloudflare Pages build settings** (per README): no build command; **Build
  output directory = `/`** (repo root).
- **Pages Function binding:** `env.ASSETS` (Cloudflare Pages static-assets
  binding) — used in `_middleware.js`. `env.next`/`request` are standard Pages
  Function params. No custom env vars.
- **Custom domains:** ~25 subdomains under `gil.consulting` added manually in the
  Pages project (full list in README).
- **`.gitignore`:** `.DS_Store`, `*.zip`, `files/`.

---

## 13 Known Issues & Tech Debt

(grep `TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX` found no code markers — only the literal word "Todo"
in `veritas-platform.html` UI copy, not a code TODO.)

Real issues observed:
- **`pentest.html` form is non-functional** — `action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORM_ID"`
  is an unfilled placeholder.
- **Mixed form backends** — most pages use FormSubmit, but `foundrybase.html` and
  `pentest.html` use Formspree, creating two delivery paths to maintain.
- **Orphan pages not routed** — `foundrybase.html`, `foundrybase-landing.html`,
  `afterlight-landing.html`, `clearance-landing.html`, `fracture-landing.html`,
  `veritas-landing.html`, `pentest.html` exist in root but are absent from
  `SUBDOMAIN_MAP` (no subdomain). Several appear to be drafts / alternate
  versions; intent unclear.
- **Missing OG tags** on 8 pages: `index.html`, `pentest.html`,
  `foundrybase.html`, and all five `*-landing.html` drafts have no `og:image`.
  (Last commit backfilled OG only for the 24 mapped products.)
- **No analytics** — zero visibility into traffic/conversions on any page.
- **`files/` is git-ignored** — 10 draft pages there are untracked and excluded
  from deploy; easy to lose.
- **`SUBDOMAIN_MAP` ↔ README ↔ file list must be kept in sync by hand**; adding a
  product touches 3 places + Cloudflare custom-domain UI.
- **`files.zip` present in working tree** (git-ignored via `*.zip`).

---

## 14 Patterns & Conventions

- **One product = one self-contained `.html` file** in repo root. No shared
  CSS/JS; each page inlines its own `<style>` and theme via CSS custom properties
  in `:root`.
- **Per-product dark theme** with a distinctive accent palette and font pairing;
  hexagon `⬡` inline-SVG data-URI favicon is the shared brand mark.
- **`<head>` SEO block** is standardized: `description` + matching `og:*` +
  `twitter:summary_large_image` card, OG image at
  `https://gil.consulting/og/<product>.png`.
- **Beta form convention:** `<form action="https://formsubmit.co/beta@gil.consulting"
  method="POST">` with hidden `_next`, `_captcha=false`, per-product `_subject`
  ("Beta Request — <Product>"), and a single required `email` input.
- **Adding a product (per README):** create `<product>.html` → add to
  `SUBDOMAIN_MAP` → add Cloudflare custom domain → commit/push (auto-deploy).
- **Lowercase, hyphenless filenames** for mapped products; `*-landing.html`
  suffix marks draft/alternate landing variants (unmapped).

---

## 15 Feature Flags & Tier Gating

N/A — no feature flags, entitlements, or pricing-tier gating in code. Pages are
static marketing surfaces; any plan/tier mentions are descriptive copy only.
